grades.expectation: Response references CLC Code of Conduct ethical principles or outcomes
grades.reason: Specifically references Principle 3 and section 3.6 of the CLC Code of Conduct

grades.expectation: Response mentions the CLC's outcomes-focused approach
grades.reason: No mention of the CLC's outcomes-focused regulatory approach

grades.expectation: Response covers complaint recording and reporting requirements
grades.reason: Mentions keeping a complaints register to record details and how complaints were handled

grades.expectation: Response mentions the Legal Ombudsman escalation pathway
grades.reason: Clearly states clients should be informed of their right to escalate to the Legal Ombudsman

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CLC requirements from SRA/Law Society complaints procedures
grades.reason: No distinction made between CLC and other regulatory body requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions transparency obligations to the client
grades.reason: Mentions providing clear explanation to client and addressing all issues raised
